query: Can I get a refund after 45 days?
expected_answer: No. Refunds are only within 30 days unless an approved exception applies.

query: I was charged twice for the same order.
expected_answer: Duplicate charges are credited automatically once confirmed against transaction history.

query: If I cancel mid-month do I get money back for the rest of the month?
expected_answer: No partial-period refunds on cancellation; access lasts until the end of the billing period.

query: What counts as an approved refund exception?
